title: codereview-pass1-edhoc-initiator TH calc and context_3
description: In edhoc_initiator_process_msg2: TH_3 uses plaintext_2 instead of CIPHERTEXT_2; context_3 includes TH_3 causing MAC/sig_structure mismatch per pass2; TH_4 uses PLAINTEXT_3 instead of CIPHERTEXT_3 per pass2 finding (plaintext leak in transcript); many 'ponytail:' dead comments violate no-dead-code rule. P2 correctness, P3 maintainability. Tag codereview. Must fix all P0-P4.
close_reason: 3 clean codereview passes converged on initiator fixes (TH_3/CIPHERTEXT_2+compute_th, context_3 omit TH_3, TH_4=CIPHERTEXT_3, no dead code/ponytail comments, credential simplification per HUMAN, C11 no-alloc, EDHOC_ prefixes). Python edhoc/oscore tests + west build validation passed. Conventional commit prepared.
